_meta.name: Lusaber fake-domains registry
_meta.description: Known Armenian-targeted disinformation domains. Each entry is a documented fake outlet identified by Armenian fact-checkers (CivilNetCheck, media.am, InFact) or by Microsoft Threat Analysis Center reporting on Storm-1516. New entries should be added only with a citation in the `source` field. The single placeholder entry below illustrates the schema and should be replaced once real CivilNet investigations are ingested in data/labeler.py.

schema.domain: string — bare domain (no scheme, no path)
schema.mimics: string — real outlet the fake is impersonating

domains.source: Storm-1516 campaign — Bloomberg impersonator targeting Armenia
